system.effect: The character is behind cover and cannot move or take actions other than staying in cover. They may attempt a Willpower test as a Full Action to break free of Pinning.
system.removal: The character must pass a Willpower test (Full Action) to shake off Pinning. Certain talents or abilities may allow automatic recovery.

description.value: The character has been forced into cover by enemy fire and is too suppressed to act. While Pinned, the character cannot move or take any actions other than remaining in cover. On their Turn, they may spend a Full Action to attempt a Willpower test to break free. On a success, they are no longer Pinned and may act normally on their next Turn. If there is no available cover, the character must go Prone instead.
